list.name: database
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT TABLE_SCHEMA AS __value, TABLE_SCHEMA AS __text FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'issues' ORDER BY TABLE_SCHEMA
list.label: Rig Database

list.name: convoy_id
list.label: Convoy
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, CONCAT(LEFT(title, 80), ' [', CASE WHEN status = 'open' THEN 'launched' WHEN status LIKE 'staged%' THEN status ELSE status END, ']') AS __text FROM hq.issues WHERE issue_type = 'convoy' AND status NOT IN ('closed') ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'open' THEN 0 WHEN status = 'in_progress' THEN 1 WHEN status LIKE 'staged%' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, created_at DESC

targets.rawSql: SELECT c.id, LEFT(c.title, 80) AS title, c.status, c.priority, COALESCE(NULLIF(c.owner,''),'—') AS owner, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(c.metadata, '$.merge_strategy')) AS merge_strategy, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(c.metadata, '$.integration_branch')) AS branch, c.created_at, c.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hq.dependencies d WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks') AS tracked_beads FROM hq.issues c WHERE c.id = '${convoy_id}'

panels.title: Wave Progress
panels.description: Completion status of tracked beads grouped by dependency wave

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM hq.dependencies b WHERE b.depends_on_id = i.id AND b.type = 'blocks' AND b.issue_id IN (SELECT depends_on_id FROM hq.dependencies WHERE issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND type = 'tracks')) THEN 'Has dependents' ELSE 'No blockers' END AS wave_hint, i.id, LEFT(i.title, 60) AS title, i.status, COALESCE(NULLIF(i.assignee,''),'—') AS assignee, COALESCE(NULLIF(i.rig,''),'—') AS rig, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.updated_at, NOW()) AS mins_since_update FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues i ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = i.id WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sfgastown.dependencies b WHERE b.depends_on_id = i.id AND b.type = 'blocks') THEN 'Has dependents' ELSE 'No blockers' END, i.id, LEFT(i.title, 60), i.status, COALESCE(NULLIF(i.assignee,''),'—'), 'sfgastown', TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.updated_at, NOW()) FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN sfgastown.issues i ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = i.id WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'hooked' THEN 0 WHEN 'open' THEN 1 WHEN 'in_progress' THEN 2 WHEN 'closed' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

SELECT i.status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues i ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = i.id WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' GROUP BY i.status UNION ALL SELECT i.status, COUNT(*) FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN sfgastown.issues i ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = i.id WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' GROUP BY i.status UNION ALL SELECT i.status, COUNT(*) FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN lora_forge.issues i ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = i.id WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' GROUP BY i.status UNION ALL SELECT i.status, COUNT(*) FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN sf_workflows.issues i ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = i.id WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' GROUP BY i.status
SELECT CONCAT(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_at, NOW()), 'h') AS age FROM hq.issues WHERE id = '${convoy_id}'

SELECT CONCAT(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(i.updated_at), NOW()), 'm ago') AS last_activity FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues i ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = i.id WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks'

panels.title: Hooked Beads (all rigs)
panels.description: All beads currently hooked to an agent across all rigs

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'hq' AS rig, i.id, LEFT(i.title, 60) AS title, i.issue_type, i.assignee AS agent, COALESCE(NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.metadata, '$.feature_branch')),'null'),'—') AS feature_branch, COALESCE(NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.metadata, '$.integration_branch')),'null'),'—') AS integration_branch, i.updated_at, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.updated_at, NOW()) AS idle_mins FROM hq.issues i WHERE i.status = 'hooked' UNION ALL SELECT 'sfgastown', i.id, LEFT(i.title, 60), i.issue_type, i.assignee, COALESCE(NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.metadata, '$.feature_branch')),'null'),'—'), COALESCE(NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.metadata, '$.integration_branch')),'null'),'—'), i.updated_at, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.updated_at, NOW()) FROM sfgastown.issues i WHERE i.status = 'hooked' UNION ALL SELECT 'lora_forge', i.id, LEFT(i.title, 60), i.issue_type, i.assignee, COALESCE(NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.metadata, '$.feature_branch')),'null'),'—'), COALESCE(NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.metadata, '$.integration_branch')),'null'),'—'), i.updated_at, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.updated_at, NOW()) FROM lora_forge.issues i WHERE i.status = 'hooked' UNION ALL SELECT 'sf_workflows', i.id, LEFT(i.title, 60), i.issue_type, i.assignee, COALESCE(NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.metadata, '$.feature_branch')),'null'),'—'), COALESCE(NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.metadata, '$.integration_branch')),'null'),'—'), i.updated_at, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.updated_at, NOW()) FROM sf_workflows.issues i WHERE i.status = 'hooked' ORDER BY idle_mins ASC

panels.title: Agent Assignments (by assignee)
panels.description: All hooked beads grouped by agent, showing branch info when available

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'hq' AS rig, i.assignee AS agent, COUNT(*) AS hooked_beads, GROUP_CONCAT(i.id ORDER BY i.updated_at DESC SEPARATOR ', ') AS bead_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.metadata, '$.feature_branch')),'null'),'—') SEPARATOR ', ') AS branches FROM hq.issues i WHERE i.status = 'hooked' AND i.assignee IS NOT NULL GROUP BY i.assignee UNION ALL SELECT 'sfgastown', i.assignee, COUNT(*), GROUP_CONCAT(i.id ORDER BY i.updated_at DESC SEPARATOR ', '), GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.metadata, '$.feature_branch')),'null'),'—') SEPARATOR ', ') FROM sfgastown.issues i WHERE i.status = 'hooked' AND i.assignee IS NOT NULL GROUP BY i.assignee UNION ALL SELECT 'lora_forge', i.assignee, COUNT(*), GROUP_CONCAT(i.id ORDER BY i.updated_at DESC SEPARATOR ', '), GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.metadata, '$.feature_branch')),'null'),'—') SEPARATOR ', ') FROM lora_forge.issues i WHERE i.status = 'hooked' AND i.assignee IS NOT NULL GROUP BY i.assignee UNION ALL SELECT 'sf_workflows', i.assignee, COUNT(*), GROUP_CONCAT(i.id ORDER BY i.updated_at DESC SEPARATOR ', '), GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.metadata, '$.feature_branch')),'null'),'—') SEPARATOR ', ') FROM sf_workflows.issues i WHERE i.status = 'hooked' AND i.assignee IS NOT NULL GROUP BY i.assignee ORDER BY hooked_beads DESC
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(wisp_type,''), 'untyped') AS type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ${database}.issues WHERE ephemeral = 1 AND status != 'closed' GROUP BY wisp_type ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_wisps FROM ${database}.issues WHERE ephemeral = 1 AND status = 'open'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS hooked_wisps FROM ${database}.issues WHERE ephemeral = 1 AND status = 'hooked'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS wisps_table FROM ${database}.wisps WHERE status = 'open'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS closed_today FROM ${database}.issues WHERE ephemeral = 1 AND status = 'closed' AND closed_at >= CURDATE()

SELECT i.id, LEFT(i.title, 60) AS title, i.status, COALESCE(NULLIF(i.wisp_type,''),'—') AS wisp_type, COALESCE(NULLIF(i.assignee,''),'—') AS assignee, COALESCE(NULLIF(i.mol_type,''),'—') AS mol_type, i.created_at, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.created_at, NOW()) AS age_mins FROM ${database}.issues i WHERE i.ephemeral = 1 ORDER BY i.created_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT c.id, LEFT(c.title, 60) AS title, c.status, c.priority, COALESCE(NULLIF(c.owner,''),'—') AS owner, c.created_at, TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, c.created_at, NOW()) AS age_hours, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hq.dependencies d WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks') AS tracked, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT t.status FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues t ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = t.id WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks' UNION ALL SELECT t.status FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN sfgastown.issues t ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = t.id WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks' UNION ALL SELECT t.status FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN lora_forge.issues t ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = t.id WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks' UNION ALL SELECT t.status FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN sf_workflows.issues t ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = t.id WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks') x WHERE x.status = 'closed') AS done, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT t.status FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues t ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = t.id WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks' UNION ALL SELECT t.status FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN sfgastown.issues t ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = t.id WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks' UNION ALL SELECT t.status FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN lora_forge.issues t ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = t.id WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks' UNION ALL SELECT t.status FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN sf_workflows.issues t ON SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) = t.id WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks') x WHERE x.status = 'hooked') AS in_flight FROM hq.issues c WHERE c.issue_type = 'convoy' AND c.status NOT IN ('closed') ORDER BY CASE c.status WHEN 'open' THEN 0 WHEN 'in_progress' THEN 1 WHEN 'staged_ready' THEN 2 WHEN 'staged_warnings' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, c.created_at DESC

SELECT e.created_at, e.issue_id AS bead, e.event_type, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.actor,''),'—') AS actor, e.old_value, e.new_value, LEFT(e.comment, 200) AS comment FROM ${database}.events e WHERE e.issue_id IN (SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) FROM hq.dependencies d WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks') OR e.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' ORDER BY e.created_at DESC LIMIT 100
